assignees.description: Task assignees. Preferred over the legacy assignee_email/assignee_name fields below.

assignee_emails.description: Flat list of assignee emails, derived from assignees[]. Used for array-contains queries and security rules — kept in sync via lib/task-utils.js buildAssigneeFields().

assignee_email.description: Deprecated — kept in sync with assignees[0] for backward compatibility.

assignee_name.description: Deprecated — kept in sync with assignees[0] for backward compatibility.

reminders_sent.description: Markers like '1:2026-07-10' (offset_days:due_date) for reminders already sent, written by the Cloud Function. Prevents duplicate sends; do not edit from the client.
